children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: After any flood event requiring operation or activation of any floodway or backwater feature within the Mississippi River and Tributaries Project through natural overtopping of a Federal levee or artificial crevassing of a Federal levee to relieve pressure on the levees elsewhere in the system, the Secretary shall expeditiously reset and restore the damaged floodway’s levees.

children.heading: Consultation
children.label: b Consultation
children.text: In carrying out subsection (a), the Secretary shall provide an opportunity for consultation with affected communities.

children.heading: Mississippi River and Tributaries Project
children.label: c Mississippi River and Tributaries Project
children.text: The term “Mississippi River and Tributaries Project” means the Mississippi River and Tributaries project authorized by the Act of (Chap. 569; ).May 15, 192845 Stat. 534
